name: Tortilla Roll Ups
recipeIngredient: 1 package Hidden Valley Ranch dressing mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first three ingredients together.
2. Spread the mixture evenly on each tortilla.
3. Drain the vegetables and blot them dry with a paper towel.
4. Sprinkle the vegetables over the cream cheese mixture.
5. Roll up the tortillas tightly.
6. Chill for a minimum of two hours.
7. Slice and serve.
